name: Pumpkin Bars & Cream Cheese
recipeInstructions:
Bars: Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, soda, salt, and cloves in a bowl. Stir in eggs, pumpkin, and oil until thoroughly combined. Spread batter into an ungreased 15x10x2-inch pan (a 9x13 inch pan can be used; the bars will just come out slightly higher). Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack, then frost with cream cheese topping and cut into bars.
Cream Cheese Topping: Beat together cream cheese, margarine or butter, and vanilla until light and fluffy. Gradually add 2 cups powdered sugar, beating well. Gradually beat in enough remaining powdered sugar to make a topping of spreading consistency. Cover bars and store in the refrigerator.
